name: Shadow Drift - Egress Detour
failure_mode: Network posture still looks mostly private, but one request path now detours through an unexpected egress route tied to current-day DNS evidence.
detection: Use Day 12 DNS and private-endpoint proof only. The downstream signal is an egress symptom in current network posture.
remediation: 1. Confirm the detour from current-day network evidence. 2. Patch the current-day DNS or endpoint surface. 3. Re-run the Day 12 verification path.
